_comment: Tools whose NAME contains a mutation-ish verb (create/update/delete/bulk/...) but which are genuinely READ-ONLY by design (e.g. async-job status pollers, getters). The mislabel ratchet in write-coverage.test.mjs flags any mutation-named tool that is not marked `readOnlyHint: false` UNLESS it is listed here — this converts 'trust the self-declared readOnlyHint' into 'the tool name and the hint must agree, with read-by-design exceptions made explicit and reviewable'. Adding an entry is a deliberate, reviewable act: only list a tool here if it performs NO outbound mutation. Two-way ratchet: a stale entry (no longer a mutation-named read) must be removed.
